Real-time Analysis
Powerful Features

Everything You Need to Verify Content

Our comprehensive toolkit helps educators, publishers, and content creators ensure authenticity in an AI-powered world.

AI Detection

Advanced algorithms analyze sentence-level AI probability with detailed breakdowns of which parts of text are likely AI-generated.

Plagiarism Check

Compare your text against known sources and get a plagiarism score to ensure content originality and academic integrity.

Scan History

Keep track of all your past analyses with persistent storage. Review previous scans, compare results, and download reports.

Simple Process

How It Works

Get accurate AI detection results in seconds with our streamlined three-step process.

01

Paste Your Text

Simply copy and paste the content you want to analyze. Supports up to 10,000 characters per scan for comprehensive analysis.

02

AI Analyzes

Our advanced algorithms examine each sentence, checking patterns, vocabulary, and structure against AI language models.

03

Get Results

Receive detailed insights including overall AI probability, sentence-by-sentence breakdown, and actionable recommendations.

Trusted Worldwide

Loved by Professionals

Join thousands of educators, publishers, and content creators who rely on TruthLens daily.
